query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN customerExternalId IS NULL THEN 'SQL_NULL'
    WHEN customerExternalId = '' THEN 'EMPTY_STRING'
    WHEN customerExternalId = 'NULL' THEN 'STRING_NULL'
    WHEN customerExternalId = 'Unassigned' THEN 'STRING_UNASSIGNED'
    ELSE 'HAS_VALUE'
  END as id_type,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost), 2) as totalCost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 2) as totalRevenue
FROM services 
WHERE (monthlyCost > 0 OR monthlyRevenue > 0)
  AND (billingPeriod IS NULL OR billingPeriod != 'archived')
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
GROUP BY id_type
ORDER BY id_type;

    WHEN customerExternalId = 'NULL' THEN 'STRING_NULL'
    WHEN customerExternalId = 'Unassigned' THEN 'STRING_UNASSIGNED'
    ELSE 'HAS_VALUE'
  END as id_type,
  COUNT(*) as cnt,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost), 2) as totalCost,
